title: Keystone Policy Manifest
description: Manifest at the root of a keystone policy/policy repo. Filename on disk: keystone-policy.json.

name.description: The policy's unique name. Lowercase, kebab-case, ≤64 chars.

keystone_min.description: Minimum keystone binary version this policy requires (SemVer).

strict.description: Items this policy ships and locks absolutely. A strict item cannot be overridden by anything — not the consumer's project, not any other policy, regardless of nesting.

required.description: Items this policy expects to exist somewhere in the cascade but does not ship itself.

strictSpec.description: Items by kind. `sensors` may only be shipped by the project layer or by top-level policies in the consumer's keystone.json — policies nested under another policy may not ship or strict-claim sensors.
